Hero.name: Vladyslav Babii
Hero.role: Developer — Telegram Mini Apps, websites & AI products

Manifesto.buildText: I don't just write code. I build products people use. Not demos — things that take real orders.
Manifesto.craftStack: React · TypeScript · Next.js · GSAP · WebGL · Supabase · OpenAI · Telegram

About.label: About
About.p1: Nineteen. From Kharkiv, building in Warsaw.
About.p2: A month into development I designed, built and launched a real AI product — not a demo, a tool a business uses every day to take orders.
About.p3: Before code I ran my own projects and shipped. I read a build like an owner: from the first pixel to the bottom line. Whatever I start, I take to the finish.
